audience: Businesses assessing VisualVibe's ability to design and build content-rich marketing websites
primaryDutchSearchIntent: De eigen servergerenderde website, kennisbank en het portfolioplatform van VisualVibe als technische case bekijken.

searchIntent.question: How does VisualVibe structure its own server-rendered website, knowledge base and portfolio platform?

longTailKeywords: website with knowledge base and portfolio
directAnswer: VisualVibe uses a server-rendered Next.js platform to connect its services, knowledge base, case studies, lead handling, email and managed portfolio content.
title: VisualVibe website and server-rendered content platform
metaDescription: See how VisualVibe built its Next.js platform with SSR, ISR, a topic-based knowledge base, case studies, Firestore management, lead handling, email and technical SEO.
